languages.original_text: "I must urge you not to visit the laboratory in my absence, Interrogator. Nuncius becomes quite unsettled when he cannot find our materials for testing in their proper places."

languages.text: "Я настоятельно прошу вас более не посещать лабораторию в мое отсутствие, дознаватель. Нунциус весьма нервничает, когда не обнаруживает экспериментальных объектов на своих местах".
"I must urge you not to visit the laboratory in my absence, Interrogator. Nuncius becomes quite unsettled when he cannot find our materials for testing in their proper places."
languages.original_text: "Я настоятельно прошу вас более не посещать лабораторию в мое отсутствие, дознаватель. Нунциус весьма нервничает, когда не обнаруживает экспериментальных объектов на своих местах".

traits.locale_text: "I must urge you not to visit the laboratory in my absence, Interrogator. Nuncius becomes quite unsettled when he cannot find our materials for testing in their proper places."
"I must urge you not to visit the laboratory in my absence, Interrogator. Nuncius becomes quite unsettled when he cannot find our materials for testing in their proper places."
"I must urge you not to visit the laboratory in my absence, Interrogator. Nuncius becomes quite unsettled when he cannot find our materials for testing in their proper places."

languages.text: «Le ruego que no visite el laboratorio en mi ausencia, interrogador. Nuncius se pone muy nervioso cuando no encuentra nuestros materiales de prueba en su lugar».
languages.original_text: "I must urge you not to visit the laboratory in my absence, Interrogator. Nuncius becomes quite unsettled when he cannot find our materials for testing in their proper places."

traits.locale_text: «Le ruego que no visite el laboratorio en mi ausencia, interrogador. Nuncius se pone muy nervioso cuando no encuentra nuestros materiales de prueba en su lugar».

languages.text: 「私の不在中に研究室を訪れるのは、おやめいただきたいのです、インテロゲイター。我々の試験用の資材が、あるべき場所に見当たらないと、ヌンキウスがひどく落ち着きを失うものですから」
languages.original_text: "I must urge you not to visit the laboratory in my absence, Interrogator. Nuncius becomes quite unsettled when he cannot find our materials for testing in their proper places."

traits.locale_text: 「私の不在中に研究室を訪れるのは、おやめいただきたいのです、インテロゲイター。我々の試験用の資材が、あるべき場所に見当たらないと、ヌンキウスがひどく落ち着きを失うものですから」

languages.text: “审讯官，请务必不要在我缺席时造访实验室。无法在原位置找到实验材料，努恩修斯会变得极为不安。”
languages.original_text: "I must urge you not to visit the laboratory in my absence, Interrogator. Nuncius becomes quite unsettled when he cannot find our materials for testing in their proper places."

traits.locale_text: “审讯官，请务必不要在我缺席时造访实验室。无法在原位置找到实验材料，努恩修斯会变得极为不安。”

languages.text: "Ich muss Euch bitten, das Labor in meiner Abwesenheit nicht zu betreten, Interrogator. Nuncius kann recht ungehalten sein, wenn er unsere Testmaterialien nicht an ihrem vorgesehenen Platz findet."
languages.original_text: "I must urge you not to visit the laboratory in my absence, Interrogator. Nuncius becomes quite unsettled when he cannot find our materials for testing in their proper places."

traits.locale_text: "Ich muss Euch bitten, das Labor in meiner Abwesenheit nicht zu betreten, Interrogator. Nuncius kann recht ungehalten sein, wenn er unsere Testmaterialien nicht an ihrem vorgesehenen Platz findet."

languages.text: « Je vous prie de ne pas entrer dans le laboratoire en notre absence, interrogateur. Nuncius perd la tête lorsque notre équipement n'est pas rangé à sa place. »
languages.original_text: "I must urge you not to visit the laboratory in my absence, Interrogator. Nuncius becomes quite unsettled when he cannot find our materials for testing in their proper places."

traits.locale_text: « Je vous prie de ne pas entrer dans le laboratoire en notre absence, interrogateur. Nuncius perd la tête lorsque notre équipement n'est pas rangé à sa place. »

languages.text: "Ben yokken laboratuvarı ziyaret etmemenizi rica ediyorum Sorgucu. Nuncius, test materyallerimizi yerinde bulamadığında oldukça huzursuz oluyor."
languages.original_text: "I must urge you not to visit the laboratory in my absence, Interrogator. Nuncius becomes quite unsettled when he cannot find our materials for testing in their proper places."

traits.locale_text: "Ben yokken laboratuvarı ziyaret etmemenizi rica ediyorum Sorgucu. Nuncius, test materyallerimizi yerinde bulamadığında oldukça huzursuz oluyor."
